message:
test(providers): add VCR fixtures, closure truth table tests, redaction scan, and Ollama e2e

New test infrastructure for provider verification and security:

VCR fixtures:
- cohere_auth_failure_401.json: Recorded Cohere API 401 response for
  auth failure conformance testing (invalid/expired API key scenario)
- cohere_rate_limit_429.json: Recorded Cohere API 429 response for
  rate limit conformance testing (retry-after header, error shape)
- oauth_refresh_success.json: Minor fix to existing OAuth refresh fixture

New test files:
- provider_closure_truth_table.rs (692 lines): Exhaustive truth table
  tests that verify every provider in PROVIDER_METADATA has correct
  closure properties — factory dispatch, base URL normalization, API
  type mapping, and alias resolution all round-trip correctly
- vcr_redaction_scan.rs (315 lines): Security-focused test that scans
  all VCR fixture files for accidentally recorded secrets (API keys,
  bearer tokens, auth headers with real credentials) to prevent
  credential leaks in the test fixture corpus
- e2e_ollama_live.rs (205 lines): Live integration tests for Ollama
  local inference provider, gated behind CI_E2E_TESTS env var to
  avoid requiring a running Ollama instance in normal test runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "cohere_auth_failure_401",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-14T01:30:00.000Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://api.cohere.com/v2/chat",
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Accept",
+            "text/event-stream"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Authorization",
+            "[REDACTED]"
+          ]
+        ],
+        "body": {
+          "model": "command-r-plus",
+          "messages": [
+            {
+              "role": "user",
+              "content": "Trigger an auth failure."
+            }
+          ],
+          "stream": true
+        }
+      },
+      "response": {
+        "status": 401,
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ]
+        ],
+        "body_chunks": [
+          "{\"message\":\"invalid api token\"}"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@
+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "cohere_rate_limit_429",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-14T01:30:00.000Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://api.cohere.com/v2/chat",
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Accept",
+            "text/event-stream"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Authorization",
+            "[REDACTED]"
+          ]
+        ],
+        "body": {
+          "model": "command-r-plus",
+          "messages": [
+            {
+              "role": "user",
+              "content": "Trigger a rate limit."
+            }
+          ],
+          "stream": true
+        }
+      },
+      "response": {
+        "status": 429,
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Retry-After",
+            "60"
+          ]
+        ],
+        "body_chunks": [
+          "{\"message\":\"rate limit exceeded\"}"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}
